summary: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and operating scalable web applications and enterprise systems. Proven track record delivering high-quality solutions using modern JavaScript frameworks and Python backends. Strong collaborator with cross-functional teams, adept at translating complex business requirements into clean, maintainable code. Experienced in cloud-native architectures on AWS and GCP, CI/CD pipelines, and leading small engineering teams through full product lifecycles.

experience.summary: Lead engineer on the customer-facing portal serving 500k+ monthly active users. Spearheaded migration from monolith to microservices, reducing deployment time by 60%.
achievements: Architected and delivered a real-time notifications system using WebSockets and Redis Pub/Sub, reducing support tickets by 35%.
Led a team of 4 engineers through a full rewrite of the checkout flow, increasing conversion rate by 12%.
Introduced automated integration testing with 85% coverage, cutting production incidents in half.

experience.summary: Core member of a 6-person engineering team building a SaaS platform for HR analytics. Owned the frontend from scratch and contributed heavily to the Python REST API.
achievements: Built a configurable dashboard builder using React and D3.js adopted by 200+ enterprise clients.
Designed and implemented a multi-tenant data isolation model in PostgreSQL.
Reduced average API response time from 800ms to 120ms through query optimisation and caching.

experience.summary: Held junior and mid-level engineering roles at two early-stage startups, contributing to product development across full stack web applications, internal tooling, and third-party integrations.
